## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance / deps / config
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructure, no behavior change

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch targets `dev` (not `main`)

- [ ] API response shape unchanged (or explicitly discussed)
